api.//tenant: The tenant is resolved by the gateway from the 'X-FactoryOS-Tenant' header (preferred) or the 'tenant' query fallback shown below; a request with no resolvable tenant is rejected with 400.
api.lines: GET /m/quality/lines[?breaching=true]   (header X-FactoryOS-Tenant: <tenant>)  |  GET /m/quality/lines?tenant=<tenant>&breaching=true   — current per-line rolling defect rate; optional filter to only lines breaching the threshold
api.summary: GET /m/quality/summary   (header X-FactoryOS-Tenant: <tenant>)  |  GET /m/quality/summary?tenant=<tenant>   — tracked line count and how many currently breach
